embeddingText: title: Raw Pumpkin Seeds + Chia Seeds + Sunflower Seeds + Flax Seeds (250 g each) | category: SNACKS_&_SWEETS | subcategory: General Grocery | semanticTags: grocery, food, staple, kitchen essentials | missionHints: monthly_grocery_refill, weekly_grocery_shopping
name: Raw Pumpkin Seeds + Chia Seeds + Sunflower Seeds + Flax Seeds (250 g each)
description: True Elements Pumpkin Seeds are also known as pepitas are excellent snacks to be added to your diet. It is an ideal healthy bite when you are in a mood of eating a softly crunchy and nutritionally delicious snack which does not harm your body in any way. From boosting immunity to ensure good night sleep, these seeds offer a lot of potential perks. These pepitas are nutritional powerhouses wrapped up in one package! This is a rich source of Iron, Zinc, and Magnesium, provide plant-based omega-3 fatty acids, a good source of protein, and a rich source of Vitamin E. It is a source of tryptophan, anti-diabetic effect, anti-inflammatory property, no GMO, no additives and suitable for all.Ancient American Culture witnessed a wide usage of Raw Chia seeds, for both food and medicine. Not only does it play a key role in medicine but is a dream come true for the fitness freaks. True Elements Raw Chia Seeds are a great source of fiber, healthy Omega 3 fatty acids. These seeds reduce the ageing process along with giving an instant boost of energy and to top it all, they make your favourite food taste so much better. The uniqueness of the seeds comes from the fact that they are a rich source of protein that provides as an aid in skin cell regeneration and tissue repair along with the virtue of keeping a person full for hours. Consumption of the seeds results in the strengthening of bones and teeth due to the presence of calcium and phosphorous. This is a good source of calcium, filled with antioxidants and it comes with a high level of protein. Also, it is gluten-free, no preservatives, low GI, and no GMO. Raw Sunflower Seeds are highly nutritious food, beneficial for the entire body. It is an all-rounder food, which maintains the quality of the skin, improves health and nourishes hair. True Elements Raw Sunflower Seeds are totally natural and unprocessed seeds, extracted from a sunflower in its pure form. They possess a mild nutty taste, which cannot resist you from wanting it more and has a firm texture.Flax seeds, also known as Alsi, are small, shiny and flat in appearance that can be added to several of your foods. These are a tiny storehouse of vital nutrients. True Elements Flax Seeds are high-quality, natural super seeds derived from organically grown plants. They act as a healthy protector and are an outstanding source of protein and fibre. How can Flax Seeds improve your health? Are you having enough fibre in your diet? If not, add these seeds to your diet: 1 tablespoon of these seeds contains almost 8% of your daily intake of fibre. So if you eat a handful of these seeds, it will give you a lot of fibre that is required by the body. Dietary fibre is useful in losing weight and also enhances the digestion and prevents constipation. Lose weight with healthy seeds: It can help prevent obesity by keeping you fuller with fewer calories. It can help manage healthy weight, support fat loss and reduce sugar craving. It also helps maintain healthy digestion. Look better with it: The ALA in these seeds provides essential fats which help reduce dryness of skin. Vitamin B can also help reduce acne and eczema. Wonder food for your heart: Omega 3 can lower blood pressure, cholesterol and triglyceride levels. It can help reduce hypertension. Amino acids can prevent hardening of arteries, thus reducing the risk of heart failure or stroke. Finding ways to fight depression? Have these seeds: Having it in your diet can significantly reduce the depression levels. Fight cancer with this superfood: Raw seed benefits have been proven time and time again and even including fighting breast, prostate, ovarian and colon cancer. Irritated with the menopausal symptoms? Chia seeds can help: Lignans can help relieve menopausal symptoms and can also reduce the risk of osteoporosis. Besides, raw flax seeds can also help reduce dry eye syndrome, maintain a healthy brain and improve bone health.
title: Raw Pumpkin Seeds + Chia Seeds + Sunflower Seeds + Flax Seeds (250 g each)

embeddingText: title: Fields of Gold Organic Beaten Rice/Akki | category: GROCERY | subcategory: Rice | semanticTags: rice, basmati, staple, grain, cooking | missionHints: monthly_grocery_refill, weekly_grocery_shopping, weekend_cooking_session, biryani_preparation, family_gathering
name: Fields of Gold Organic Beaten Rice/Akki
description:
Unlike white rice, red rice doesn’t undergo excessive processing, and as such the other bran layer remains intact, which is rich is fiber, vitamin B, and minerals like calcium, zinc, iron, manganese, magnesium etc. Red rice is also enriched with antioxidants that help in fighting free radicals in our body, preventing the risk of diseases like cancer.
Poha is also known as flattened rice, beaten rice, rice flakes, atukulu, aval and avalakki. Its health benefits known are that they are easier to digest and have more iron content than white rice. Now, imagine the combination of Red Rice as Rice flakes! Pristine Organic Red Rice Poha is one of its kind. It has the benefits of rice flakes and of red rice. An added benefit is that it is organic as well. Rich in dietary fibre, easy to digest, simple to cook, rich in antioxidants with great texture. Red Poha is your best alternative to White Poha. Pristine’s Red Poha is the healthiest breakfast for you to kick start your day!
title: Fields of Gold Organic Beaten Rice/Akki

embeddingText: title: Powder - Sambar | category: GROCERY | subcategory: Spices | semanticTags: spices, cooking, masala, seasoning, flavor, indian cooking, staple | missionHints: monthly_grocery_refill, weekly_grocery_shopping, weekend_cooking_session, biryani_preparation, paneer_butter_masala_dinner
name: Powder - Sambar
description: Savor the authentic and traditional taste from the heart of South India with our range of Just a Minute Ready Mixes. All made from choice  herbs and spices.  In 750 ml of water add 100 g of pre-cooked Toor Dal, add 3 teaspoons of the Sambar powder, tamarind juice extract, a knob of jiggery, coarsely chopped tomatoes, onion and salt to taste and boil for 5 minutes. Finally fry a little whole mustard and curry leaves in a dab of oil and add it to the Sambar. Easy as that. Enjoy.
title: Powder - Sambar

name: Organics Desi Ghee/Tuppa With Brahmi
description: It is prepared as per ancient village traditions from ‘hand churned butter’, unlike most other dairy ghee that is processed directly from milk. Brahmi is a traditional herb known for enhancing memory, cognitive functions and learning skills, especially in children. Desi Ghee is handmade in small batches from the milk of native Indian cows. The difference is visible from the distinct aroma, taste, texture and colour. As per ayurvedic tradition, Brahmi ghee is believed to help in the development of the brain. Just one spoon of this ghee will entirely change the taste of the food you eat. It is ideal for being added to pulses, sweet dishes and vegetable curries, it is a must-have constituent in your kitchen. Use it with discretion as it contains Brahmi that is a natural brain enhancer.
title: Organics Desi Ghee/Tuppa With Brahmi
